title: Components, Cycles, Topological Order, and Unweighted Paths · Cost-Model Clinic: Topological Sort
summary: Validate a deployment dependency plan and explain unreachable service routes. Planned artifact: Add and verify the dsa topological sort increment in a dependency analyzer with path evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Produce and validate a topological order or return concrete cycle evidence.
Detect undirected and directed cycles with the correct parent or active-path state.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
